mapper.sql: id, plate, vin_topic AS vinTopic, vehicle_type AS vehicleType, capacity, driver_name AS driverName, driver_phone AS driverPhone, device_imei AS deviceImei, status, device_status AS deviceStatus, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt

where.if: AND ( plate ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR driver_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR device_imei ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT c.cargo_id AS cargoId, c.cargo_type AS cargoType, c.weight, c.status, c.origin_name AS originName, c.destination_name AS destinationName, b.bound_at AS boundAt FROM vehicles v JOIN cargo_vehicle_binding b ON b.vehicle_id = v.id AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' JOIN cargo c ON c.cargo_id = b.cargo_id WHERE v.plate = #{plate} ORDER BY b.bound_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicles ( plate, vin_topic, vehicle_type, capacity, driver_name, driver_phone, device_imei, status, device_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{plate}, #{vinTopic}, #{vehicleType}, #{capacity}, #{driverName}, #{driverPhone}, #{deviceImei}, #{status}, #{deviceStatus}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET plate = #{plate}, vin_topic = #{vinTopic}, vehicle_type = #{vehicleType}, capacity = #{capacity}, driver_name = #{driverName}, driver_phone = #{driverPhone}, device_imei = #{deviceImei}, status = #{status}, device_status = #{deviceStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM vehicles ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET device_status = #{deviceStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
